title: the wild picks
description: a mod that adds 5 new pickaxes with custom abilities
body:
# 🔨 The Wild Picks

> ⚠️ **Requires [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)** to view crafting recipes in-game.

---

## 🧱 What is The Wild Picks?

**The Wild Picks** adds 5 powerful and chaotic pickaxes (and a hammer) to Minecraft — each with its own wild ability. Whether you want destruction, protection, or extra XP, there’s a tool here for every kind of miner.

---

## 🛠️ Tools & Abilities

### 🧨 Boomstrike Pickaxe  
💣 Explodes every time you mine a block.  
> Chaos with every swing.

---

### 💥 Big Bang Hammer  
⛏️ Breaks a 3×3 area of blocks at once.  
> Perfect for fast tunneling and huge digs.

---

### 🛡️ Guardian Pickaxe  
🧱 Every block you mine gives you a little protection.  
> Stay safer deep underground.

---

### ✨ XPickaxe  
🔮 Bonus XP from every block you break.  
> Level up faster than ever.

---

### ❤️ Safe Pickaxe  
💖 Holding it gives you extra hearts.  
> The ultimate mining safety tool.

---

## 📦 Why Download?

- ✅ Fun and unique tool abilities  
- ✅ Balanced survival gameplay  
- ✅ Simple crafting with JEI support  
- ✅ No mobs or dimensions — easy to add to modpacks

---

## 🔗 Required Mod

To see crafting recipes, make sure you also install:  
➡️ [Just Enough Items (JEI) on Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
